channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Dumped tv, 6th April
item.description:
TV dumped on the streets

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Roding Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dangerously broken pavement on Marmont Road, 6th April
item.description:
This has been reported a few times now. Please take action before someone is hurt

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Marmont Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 12 inch pothole on Perry St, near The Thatch., 6th April
item.description:
12 inch pothole on Perry St, near The Thatch.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Perry Street, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped suit case, 6th April
item.description:
Dumped suit case from a theft from usual suspects prowling the streets around here between 3 and 5.30 in the morning.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 8, Buttermere Road, St Paul's Cray, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Leaves from last autumn blocking walkway, 6th April
item.description:
Pile of leaves has been there for months. We (owners of property shown in pic) have cleared a substantial amount ourselves but would politely ask council to do the rest

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Shrewsbury Road, Elmers End, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 12 inch pothole on Perry St, near The Thatch., 6th April
item.description:
12 inch pothole on Perry St, near The Thatch.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Perry Street, Chislehurst, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fallen Traffic Sign - Marmont Road, 6th April
item.description:
After ignoring previous reports for weeks that this sign was falling, it's now completely fallen. please fix, very dangerous

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Marmont Road, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: 10 inch pothole on Perry St, near nursery and The Thatch., 6th April
item.description:

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Perry Street, Chislehurst, Greater London

item.title: Box flytipped on fenham road, 6th April
item.description:
Please take away

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 3, Marmont Road, Peckham, Greater London

item.title: Fly tipping, 6th April
item.description:
Household items

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Chelmer Road, Hackney, London

item.title: Graffiti tag on wall, 6th April
item.description:
Please remove this tag that's been here for a long time.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 92, Peckham High Street, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped Mattress, 6th April
item.description:
Perhaps the Registry Heights CCTV can find out who did this (was it one of their residents??)

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 34, Beckenham Road, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on red wall and door, 6th April
item.description:
Please remove

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 121a, Peckham High Street, Peckham, Greater London

item.title: Bourne Road. Contractors carrying out resurfacing works on roundabout have failed to reinstate the road markings correctly with missing white lining road markings on the roundabout., 6th April
item.description:
Bourne Road. Contractors carrying out resurfacing works on roundabout have failed to reinstate the road markings correctly with missing white lining road markings on the roundabout.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Bourne Road, Bexley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped black bags - already torn open by foxes, 6th April
item.description:
By tomorrow; with the foxes in the area, the contents will be all over the street. If this is from the church; can they be issued warnings that this is not acceptable.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Queensgate Mews, Beckenham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Dumped items, 6th April
item.description:
Dumped items on the streets

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Coopersale Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Bed frame left at the entrance, 6th April
item.description:
This bed frame has been left in this location for more than 2 weeks. Can you please remove it? It has been left on the car entrance of E58QP, downs road Thanks

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Downs Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti on shutters, 6th April
item.description:
Please clean off the tags covering this shutter

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 51-57, Rye Lane, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti tags on brick wall, 6th April
item.description:
Please clean off the graffiti on the wall. don't just paint over please

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 61-63, Rye Lane, Peckham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti and flyposting on post box, 6th April
item.description:
